text: Australian regulatory approval received - effective date expected to be 30 July 2026
Deletion: The Board has concluded its strategic review of the Cyber business. NCC was not in receipt of any approaches
On European Tracker (Irish). Energy Capital Partners & KKR's indicative proposal increased to £65.25 per share, which Board is "minded to recommend"
Deletion: Blue Concept Hld AS confirms that it does not intend to make an offer for Deltic
